updates.title: HDFC Infinia program retention criteria updated
updates.summary: Effective 1 April 2026, HDFC introduced new program retention criteria requiring cardholders to maintain a minimum of ₹18 Lakhs in card spends or ₹50 Lakhs in relationship value per financial year.

updates.title: HDFC Infinia fee exemptions clarified
updates.summary: HDFC officially clarified that Infinia cardholders are exempt from late payment charges, overlimit fees, cash advance fees, and reward/cashback redemption fees.

tips.text: Activate HDFC Global Value Program to get an additional 1% cashback on international spends.

Use the Finnair 1:1 Avios transfer workaround to transfer points to British Airways or Qatar Airways at a 1:1 ratio. Transfer to Finnair Plus (1:1) first, then link accounts to move those Avios 1:1 to British Airways or Qatar Airways, bypassing the direct 2:1 transfer ratio.

updates.title: HDFC revised Regalia Gold base rewards rate
updates.summary: Effective 15 May 2026, HDFC Bank has revised the base reward points earning rate to 5 reward points for every ₹200 spent on eligible transactions (previously 4 points per ₹150).

updates.title: HDFC revised domestic lounge access rules for Regalia Gold
updates.summary: Effective 1 July 2026, domestic lounge access is spend-gated. Cardholders must spend at least ₹60,000 in the preceding calendar quarter to unlock 3 complimentary visits for the next quarter.

updates.title: HDFC revised DCC markup fee
updates.summary: Effective 15 May 2026, HDFC Bank has revised its Dynamic Currency Conversion (DCC) markup fee to 1.75% on INR-denominated international transactions or transactions with merchants registered overseas.

updates.title: HDFC revised Regalia Gold rewards capping
updates.summary: Effective 1 July 2025, HDFC Bank revised the reward points capping on insurance spends to 2,000 reward points per calendar month. Grocery, utility, and telecom transactions remain capped at 2,000 reward points per calendar month.

tips.text: Activate HDFC Global Value Program to get an additional 1% cashback on international spends.

Use the Finnair 1:1 Avios transfer workaround to transfer points to British Airways or Qatar Airways at a 1:1 ratio. Transfer to Finnair Plus (1:1) first, then link accounts to move those Avios 1:1 to British Airways or Qatar Airways, bypassing the direct 2:1 transfer ratio.
The best redemption option is transferring to Accor Live Limitless (ALL) at a 2:1 ratio. Since 1 Accor point is valued at Rs 2.2, this yields an effective value of Rs 1.1 per HDFC reward point.

updates.title: HDFC revised Diners Club Black rewards capping
updates.summary: Effective 1 July 2025, HDFC Bank revised the reward points capping on insurance spends to 5,000 reward points per calendar month. Grocery and utility transactions remain capped at 2,000 reward points per calendar month.

updates.title: HDFC revised DCC markup fee
updates.summary: Effective 15 May 2026, HDFC Bank has revised its Dynamic Currency Conversion (DCC) markup fee to 1.75% on INR-denominated international transactions or transactions with merchants registered overseas.

tips.text: Activate HDFC Global Value Program to get an additional 1% cashback on international spends.

Use the Finnair 1:1 Avios transfer workaround to transfer points to British Airways or Qatar Airways at a 1:1 ratio. Transfer to Finnair Plus (1:1) first, then link accounts to move those Avios 1:1 to British Airways or Qatar Airways, bypassing the direct 2:1 transfer ratio.

updates.title: HDFC revised Diners Privilege rewards, lounge access and DCC rules
updates.summary: Reward earnings moved to 4 reward points per Rs 200 on eligible categories from 15 May 2026. Lounge access becomes spend-gated from the quarter starting 1 July 2026, with 2 domestic and 1 international access per quarter available only after Rs 60,000 prior-quarter spend. The official change notice also revises INR DCC markup to 1.75% and the card reissuance fee to Rs 199.

tips.text: Activate HDFC Global Value Program to get an additional 1% cashback on international spends.

updates.title: IndusInd credit card charges revised
updates.summary: Effective 15 June 2026, IndusInd Bank has revised credit card charges. Late payment fees now range up to ₹1,300 depending on outstanding balance. Additionally, a 1% fee (plus GST) applies to Dynamic Currency Conversion (DCC) transactions, cumulative fuel transactions exceeding ₹30,000, and utility/transport payments exceeding ₹40,000 in a statement cycle.

updates.title: Complimentary airport lounge access discontinued
updates.summary: Effective 7 March 2025, IndusInd Bank discontinued all complimentary domestic and international airport lounge access benefits for the Legend credit card.

updates.title: Domestic Lounge access update
updates.summary: Effective 1st April, 2026 spends criteria tracking will be initiated to unlock complimentary domestic lounge access from July, 2026 quarter onwards.

updates.title: Golf benefit updates
updates.summary: Effective 10th March 2026, your golf benefit will now include 2 complimentary games and 2 complimentary lessons per month.

updates.title: IndusInd credit card charges revised
updates.summary: Effective 15 June 2026, IndusInd Bank has revised credit card charges. Late payment fees now range up to ₹1,300 depending on outstanding balance. Additionally, a 1% fee (plus GST) applies to Dynamic Currency Conversion (DCC) transactions, cumulative fuel transactions exceeding ₹50,000, and utility/transport payments exceeding ₹40,000 in a statement cycle.

updates.title: Domestic Lounge access update
updates.summary: Effective 1st April, 2026 spends criteria tracking of Rs 1.5 Lakh per quarter will be initiated to unlock complimentary domestic lounge access from July, 2026 quarter onwards.

updates.title: Golf and International Lounge updates
updates.summary: Effective 13th March 2025, your golf benefit includes 1 complimentary game and 1 complimentary lesson per month, and Priority Pass international lounge access is revised to 1 complimentary visit per quarter.

tips.text: The cash redemption value for Pinnacle is high at Rs 0.75 per point, but cash redemption is capped at 7,500 points per calendar month, and you can only redeem up to 50% of your total points balance at once.

updates.title: IndusInd credit card charges revised
updates.summary: Effective 15 June 2026, IndusInd Bank has revised credit card charges. Late payment fees now range up to ₹1,300 depending on outstanding balance. Additionally, a 1% fee (plus GST) applies to Dynamic Currency Conversion (DCC) transactions, cumulative fuel transactions exceeding ₹50,000, and utility/transport payments exceeding ₹40,000 in a statement cycle.
